title: AlignTune: Modular Toolkit for Post-Training Alignment of Large Language Models
abstract: AlignTune is a modular post-training alignment toolkit for reasoning-focused LLMs integrating SFT and RLHF-style methods (GRPO, PPO, IFT, DPO) with composable reward functions and structured reward-model training.

title: PERCS: Persona-Guided Controllable Biomedical Summarization Dataset
abstract: PERCS introduces a novel dataset of biomedical abstracts paired with persona-tailored summaries for four audiences: clinicians, policymakers, patients, and students.
